_comment: No-match ground truth for the semantic-rescue floor calibration (skills/autotune/calibrate.mjs). These are turns where the keyword matcher correctly finds nothing and the semantic tier should ALSO stay quiet — greetings, acknowledgements, chit-chat, generic one-liners. The floor is chosen to reject these while still rescuing genuine paraphrased skill requests. Authored set; replace/extend with real chat-log negatives when available (see project memory).
negatives: can you be a bit more concise?
what's the weather like where you are?
who won the game last night?
